---
name: Adopter or pilot report
about: Share a consented read-only PatchRail pilot outcome
labels: adopter-report, pilot-feedback, needs-triage
---

## Consent

- [ ] I maintain this repository or have permission to run PatchRail on it.
- [ ] I am not sharing raw secrets, private logs, personal data, or private paths.
- [ ] PatchRail may list the repository in `ADOPTERS.md` if this report is accepted.

Repository approved for public mention:

## PatchRail version

`patchrail --version` output or commit SHA:

## Workflow used

CI triage / Agent Control Plane queue / funded issue read-only scan / other:

## Result

Was the report useful? What root cause or next action did PatchRail identify?

## Safe evidence

Paste only redacted output or a link to a public fixture/PR. Use `patchrail redact`
and review manually before sharing.

## Follow-up

Would you like this to become a sanitized benchmark fixture, docs improvement, or
bug report?
